name: education-ai
description: Education Ai tools powered by MEOK AI Labs.

tools.name: generate_lesson_plan
tools.description: Generate a structured lesson plan with objectives, activities, and assessment.

tools.name: create_quiz
tools.description: Create a quiz with various question types aligned to Bloom's taxonomy.

tools.description: Analyze student performance trends and generate progress report.

tools.description: Recommend a personalized learning path based on student profile.

tools.name: generate_rubric
tools.description: Generate an assessment rubric with detailed criteria and descriptors.
